query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS kpi_samples (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  uid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  org_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  drive_job_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  campaign_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  route_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  timestamp VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  lat DOUBLE NOT NULL,
  lon DOUBLE NOT NULL,
  kpi_name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  value DOUBLE NOT NULL,
  unit VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  cell_id VARCHAR(50),
  technology VARCHAR(20),
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_kpi_org_job (org_id, drive_job_id),
  INDEX idx_kpi_campaign (org_id, campaign_id),
  INDEX idx_kpi_created (org_id, created_at DESC, uid DESC)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS drive_run_summaries (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  uid VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  org_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  drive_job_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  campaign_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  total_samples INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  duration_sec DOUBLE NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  distance_km DOUBLE NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  kpi_averages JSON,
  kpi_min JSON,
  kpi_max JSON,
  threshold_violations JSON,
  overall_pass BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_summary_org_campaign (org_id, campaign_id),
  INDEX idx_summary_org_job (org_id, drive_job_id)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

  INDEX idx_kpi_campaign (org_id, campaign_id),

  threshold_violations JSON,
  overall_pass BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
